nasb.text: “Then I will set over them one shepherd, My servant David, and he will feed them; he will feed them himself and be their shepherd.

esv.text: And I will set up over them one shepherd, my servant David, and he shall feed them: he shall feed them and be their shepherd.

cnv.text: “‘我必立一個牧人，就是我的僕人大衛，看管牠們，牧養牠們。他必牧養牠們，作牠們的牧人。

ccb.text: 我要立我的仆人大卫做他们的牧人，他将牧养他们，做他们的牧人。
